title: Bamboo Farm
description: A zero-tick or observer-based bamboo farm. Bamboo grows one segment at a time and can be harvested by a piston that breaks all segments above a 1-block stub. An observer watches the bamboo stub — when it grows, the observer fires a piston that breaks the top, sending drops into a water stream below. The 1-block stub remains, restarting the cycle. Extremely fast with zero-tick pulses; useful for fuel (smelting) and scaffolding.
